comment: Dogfooding: future Claude Code sessions in THIS repo auto-load the latest docs/acc entry. SessionStart hooks run with cwd at the project root, so the command uses a relative path and the `python` launcher — the one spelling that works in both POSIX shells and cmd.exe (the repo's own gotchas: Windows `python3` is the Store shim, and `${VAR}` doesn't expand under cmd). Heads-up for maintainers: approving this hook runs whatever scripts/acc_session_start.py exists on the CURRENT checkout at session start — diff scripts/ before opening a session on an untrusted branch. See README 'Auto-load on session start'.
